Kevin and his staff represented me on behalf of my late brother. Knowing that the process was difficult and  painful for me and my family, they guided me through all aspects of the case providing advice and representation in a steady but compassionate way.

Mr. Rosenstein is the first attorney that has ever stood up for me. He is an attorney. He keeps his word and he will fight for you. I was surprised to find an attorney with such amazing work ethics. He promised to have my back and he followed through on that promise. I am looking forward to working with him on the rest of my case I would recommend him to everyone and anyone looking for an attorney.

Met him in person to discuss my case in May 2020 and he did not speak to me again until December 2021 (looking at the emails I still have for date accuracy) citing issues with the investigator due to Covid. Told me I had a case then asked for $5,000 to begin. Paid him up front then told me he would stay in contact but that I couldn't speak to anyone who the case may have involved. I told him witnesses to speak to who, once the case was over, told me they were never contacted by him or his office. Not upset I lost my case anymore as the case resolved in 2021, but I do still feel taken advantage of all these years later.

Let me tell you this man can get the job done! I was nervous about going into court , but he assured me that he was going to take care of me and that’s just what he did . I couldn’t believe how fast he was able to go into the court room and get me what I wanted . It only took this man 20 minutes! The court session started at 9:00 and I was out by 9:21 . I couldn’t believe it . Will be telling anyone who needs a lawyer about him .Thanks Mr.Rosenstein !
Howard is a great attorney, he took his time to listen to me and help me out in an urgent matter! Thank you 🙏

Smart Attorney, Highly Skilled with Extensive Experience, he's a true Strategist 👍
He'll take the time to listen and then help you to create an action plan. If you need to speak with an attorney, Call Howard Rosenstein.

Howard Rosenstein handled my case with professionalism and was top of the list in his follow through. I am very happy with my results and would wholeheartedly recommend his services. His follow up was beyond my expectations.

Thank you Howard's! This man called me at 8:30 pm and took the time to listen to me not only about the reason why I was asking for help, but also referred me to an attorney that could help on something else I was going through! amazing human if you want someone who you know and trust will genuinely and sincerely care about you and what youre going through Howard is your guy!

Amazing attorney, the only people complaining on here are people who NEVER had a case to begin with. Howard has a big heart and he often works at a discounted price even though he’s been doing this for 40 years!!

Don't do it! This man will rob you and send you to jail. He'll also charge you money. You'll never see your children again. This happened to me. He's a lawyer who works with the police because he's also a former police officer. Their offices are next door. Run from this person. I hope he never hurts anyone else.
He works in his best interest, not the clients.

The amount of care and knowledge this law firm has is immeasurable.
Realistic and straight forward and available to you at a moments notice.

They have the clients interests in mind. I recommend this law firm to anyone I can. I can't think of a single downside to recommending them.

Howard Rosenstein made my problems a thing of the past, and even represented me in multiple areas in my life.

10/10. no doubt about it.

As someone who was very hesitant to go through this process, Attorney Howard Rosenstein was helpful, accessible and provided excellent services while individualizing my circumstances and clearly communicating effectively through the entire duration of my lawsuit. Howard Rosenstein was knowledgable, responsive and trustworthy with all aspects of my case while helping me through an uncomfortable issue. During my consultation I immediately felt comfortable and knew I wanted Howard Rosenstein to represent me, I could tell he would be there for me, and he was... I am honored to recommend Howard Rosenstein to anyone reaching out for legal services, you will not be disappointed!
He doesn't return call hard to get in touch with.
Outstanding level of professionalism. Did a wonderful job of getting charges dropped even before court date. Would definitely recommend to anyone to achieve peace of mind
Great Man And Very Knowledgeable.
Mr Rosenstein, was honest and informative. Trustworthy and extremely helpful. Don’t hesitate to call him.

I do not recommend this law firm, I should of know by how he answered the phone. I got a rude hello, didnt greet or even state his name or law firm.. had to confirm I called the correct number before I just gave out my information, after that I was simply trying to explain my situation.  I was cut off multiple times, talked over multiple times. Told I was giving way to much information, then asked for that same information after I was cut off then decided to stop cut me off again just to tell me prices and then asked for me to repeat the same information again. That conversation could of went 95% better if he just would of simply listened. How is it your job to listen and help when you cant even simply listen..
You want a grouch he is perfect! You want someone that actually listens and TRIES to help LOOK ELSEWHERE!
Do Not Use This Attorney

I’m proud of myself that I found you ALL ON MY OWN.

Gut instinct really is a thing.
And I had a good feeling about you.
You are the only attorney I contacted yesterday that answered their phone themself!!!

You’re a good man Howard Rosenstein!!!

Me and my wife were looking for a lawyer for my daughter. She had two cases against and we stumbled upon Howard. During our visit, he cared for my daughter as his own. It was our first time ever meeting each other but he is VERY good at what he does. Thank you, Howard! Me and my wife are truly grateful.

Mr. Rosenstein and his team (thanks, Chelsi) have done an amazing job with my brother's case.  My brother was not easy to deal with, but they dealt with him and the surrounding family with diplomacy.  They won my brother's case!  They were great to deal with and always respectful.  With the magic they worked, I found his fee to be well worth it.

Thanks, Mr. Rosenstein & Chelsi!

Worst customer service over the phone.The man who greeted me said "hello" in such a snobby tone as if I had just called his home waking him up at 5am. I let it go and proceeded with my question to only get another snobby remark from him which then just led me to give him a piece of my mind and hang up. From that experience ALONE I can tell I would never trust him as our lawyer or with our money. Taking my business elsewhere!
I encourage anyone who needs a good civil rights lawyer to contact him immediately. Howard helped me tremendously and I can't thank him enough for everything he did.
I have worked with Attorney Rosenstein and I have found him to be highly intelligent, ethical, and very responsive.
Great lawyer! Highly recommend to anyone looking for a good civil rights lawyer!!

Paid him 2,000 to just hand off my case to JD Milks and then him to never contact me! Even after I left a message for him on his voicemail!!

Do not go to him, horrible Lawyer!!

:((
Do Not Hire This Attorney  my case has been  dragging  for years

I really wanted to like this firm, especially given the other positive reviews, but it has been nothing but a headache to try and move forward with our injury case.

After receiving documents with our names misspelled, not being reached out to for follow-ups, and being assigned an attorney in an entirely different state (which we had to call to get resolved), we’re now having to seek alternative counsel while awaiting medical care and thousands of dollars in bills.

Their paralegals are friendly, but there are way too many mistakes to ignore. Avoid.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Malry, we’re so sorry this was your experience. At Zinda Law Group, we take pride in our client service and the results we achieve, so we sincerely apologize for the frustration you’ve experienced—from communication delays to administrative errors. This is not the standard we aim to uphold.

If there’s anything we can do to make things right or improve as a firm, please don’t hesitate to contact us directly at (512) 246-2224.
Thank you so much Santoy! We appreciate your 5 star review! Please let us know if you need any further representation!

reviews.text:
I initially left a five-star review when my case began in 2022. After the full course of representation, I would stay FAR AWAY. She took advantage of a domestic violence survivor trying to escape her abuser.

Throughout my custody modification case, there were repeated contract changes, billing practices that I found concerning, and significant communication failures. I experienced long, unexplained waits at the office and felt consistently underprepared for court appearances. I was told to appear for court but was not brought into the courtroom.

During critical stages of litigation, I did not feel my case was being prioritized, Lauren's personal wedding and Bachelorette party were her focus. Professional focus and preparedness are essential in family law matters, and that was not my experience.

I also had serious concerns regarding how court-awarded attorney’s fees were handled and communicated.

Family law clients are often navigating vulnerable and high-conflict situations. They deserve clear contracts, transparent billing, strong courtroom advocacy, and consistent communication. Based on my experience, I did not receive that level of representation.

For those reasons, I cannot recommend this firm.

Lauren is amazing! She has been super helpful throughout this whole process. She has guided us the whole way and prepared us for everything. It’s almost like she’s a psychic because when we went to court, every question they asked us she had already prepped us on. The goal is to not have to come back, but if we ever need another family law attorney, or know anybody who does… No one, other than Lauren. #laurenthelegend

I want to give my strongest recommendation to Lauren L. Boysen and her entire team. This is the second time they have represented me in a custody case, and once again they absolutely delivered. Lauren is aggressive, highly strategic, and never backs down.

Huge credit as well to her team — Cindy, Jennifer, Roxy, and Melanie — who were all professional, responsive, and on top of every detail. Together, they are a powerful team that truly fights for their clients and for the best interests of the children. If you want a law firm that will go to battle for you and protect your rights without hesitation, this is the team you need.
Thank you Attorney Boysen and Team! Attorney Boysen did a great job of getting divorce finalized in the time frame I requested. Met and exceeded expectations! Yes I would definitely recommend her.

Lauren was the 3rd lawyer I had an appointment with and immediately knew that she was the one I needed to represent me. She made me feel like a real person and not just a business. Her whole staff is incredibly helpful and so easy to contact. Definitely recommend. Go Lincoln lawyer !

Absolutely love Lauren and her team!! I truly cannot recommend Lauren enough. From the first time meeting with her, she has taken the time to listen, explain, and just talk me through everything I needed while going through the process. Her team always has so much compassion and drive while helping Lauren bring her top A game every time. You truly will not be disappointed going to her.

I could not be more ecstatic about my results with Ms. Boysen.  She was phenomenal at listening, understanding, and fighting hard for me when it mattered.  I was worried and anxious to no end throughout this hard process.  It does take time but in the end, it is worth it.  I highly recommend her for a great ATTORNEY to fight for you.  (All single moms with an ex-husband who doesn't pay his part.  Contact her now!!!)

Oh I don’t even know where to start, Mrs. Boysen and her team have been nothing but amazing. All her staff are very communicative and always answering my calls or texts as to Lauren she is incredible . She definitely being  her A game in the court.  She always makes sure everything is always to the best interest of her client. After going through a custody battle she definitely made the process smooth and easy. I am extremely grateful I came across her law firm. I 100% recommend her services. You will not be disappointed at all I promise you.
I love lauren she is the best ...always will i go to her

Going for full custody of my 4 children has been the most intimidating experience I have ever had as a father. Texas is notoriously a mom state and I didn’t have high hopes but knew I needed to try.

I talked with a few lawyers that advised me to lower my expectations, ask for 50/50 and hope a judge would see between the lines and give me more. When I sat down with Lauren I didn’t even finish the sentence before she said “absolutely not.” On top of hours (given the amount of communication I shared I imagine it would be days, really) of meticulously reading through texts/emails, taking notes and discussing my case- Lauren and her staff found time to reach out and check up on myself and my kiddos throughout the process. She did not back down, she was professional and concise…..her staff was accommodating and so kind.

Lauren fought for the 4 best things that have ever happened to me and was gracious and empathetic to my ex-partner. Maintaining the goal of reunification and equal access so long as we are both stable, healthy and acting in their best interest. I am so thankful to have found someone that doesn’t see dads as “second class parents” and did everything and more for me to get what I was ultimately hoping for: full custody AND a parenting plan. My kids are happy, my ex partner is doing hard work and I am eternally grateful and so blessed.

Do yourself a favor and find another lawyer. Court was an absolute joke. Her tactics are amateur at best. And that’s a stretch. She said that she was a father’s rights attorney but did nothing to help. All she kept saying was if you don’t do this or that then you’ll lose custody, when there were NO grounds to lose custody. She kept playing defense when she should have been playing offense. She had no idea what she was doing. She didn’t notify us about court!! Let that sink in. So the opposing party got whatever they wanted & she signed off on it. So unethical!! She should not be practicing law!! I don’t know how you haven’t been personally sued!
reviews.ownerResponse: Are you sure you have the right firm..? None of these facts have ever occurred with one of my clients and I don’t know who you are. Please tell me who you’re referring to.

reviews.text: Lauren is beyond amazing! She cares about her clients as if they are truly family & she does not disappoint in that court room!!! If I could give more stars I totally would!!! We appreciate you & your team Lauren!!!
Her and her team are amazing they helped us maneuver a roller coaster ride, all while we were treated as people not just a client.

Lauren and her staff are by far the most hard working team you will find. The divorce process can be long and hard, especially when dealing with someone who is high conflict like I was.  I could not have done it without Lauren or her team. She is a force to be reckoned with and will fight with everything she has.  Lauren and her team kept in contact throughout the whole process.  They were able to calm me down when I was nervous about something, and made me feel confident in my case. The day of final trial she came in with her team and hauling a mountain of evidence with her. I have never felt so confident as when I saw her walk into court. She knows the court system and she will do everything in her power to help her clients.  Divorce isn’t easy but choosing the right lawyer was.  If you are going through a divorce with someone who is high conflict don’t risk your future, and your children’s future with someone who isn’t willing to do the work.  I wasn’t just a case number to her.  Her team knew me, my case, my kids names, and my history.  When you hire Lauren you don’t just hire her, but her team.  And with this team you can’t go wrong.

I have never met a person more perfect for the profession they are in. If you want to feel safe, retain Lauren.

Divorce is not something many look forward to going through. You never divorce the same person you marry and the process of untangling a life you have built together is painful, slow and sometimes vicious.

When I was searching for lawyers I was terrified. I typed in “divorce lawyer near me” and started down the list reading reviews and nobody jumped out at me; that is until I came across Lauren’s office. Something about it just felt right. I showed up a disheveled, apologetic mess and waited for her to join me in the conference room. It was as if her energy wrapped a warm blanket around my shoulders and it didn’t leave, even after everything was finalized.

Lauren is a person. She exudes safety and she listens- really LISTENS- and she cares. She is a siren. It’s amazing to watch her as she is sweet and personable, can charm the pants off of just about anyone that sits across the table from her and then she pounces. All with the sweetest smile. The woman is a weapon.

Any time I got scared and called they were there. I would get panicked throughout the process and she would smile and shake her head; “I’ve got your back.” There were things I didn’t want to use unless absolutely necessary that any other lawyer would have pressed, insisted, tried to convince it was sure to secure a “win”. I didn’t even have to explain, she promised we would do exactly what *I* was comfortable with. She helped me maintain focus, prioritized mine and my children’s future, and even when I was losing hope on mediation day- she was there to remind me that she just. Doesn’t. Quit. My ex husbands lawyer was red in the face, huffy, ready to call it for the day and after 40 minutes of talking with him she came back and this dude was happy as a clam. I don’t know how she does it.

Her staff is second to none; they make everything so comfortable and are so pleasant to be around. Absolutely hilarious. I was between crying over the end of a chapter in life and crying laughing with different staff members as they stopped in to check on me, bring by drinks (they don’t even do mini water bottles- it’s all redbull, name brand and full sized. they didn’t come to play!!) and/or join Lauren with legal books to assist in the case.

I could never express how thankful I am for this office, but especially for this person. Sitting next to her is like sitting next to that mom we all knew growing up that wasn’t going to let ANYONE touch her kid. She is the safe eyes you look for when you get lost in a crowd. She is who you want to articulate and organize your scattered thoughts when going through something as delicate as divorce. She is special and if you need representation, you need her.

It's great knowing you have the Best Legal Council an representation to handle your issues
Thank you

I had a great experience working with Lauren during my divorce process. She was compassionate and professional throughout. The office staff was always polite, and the office itself was clean and welcoming, which made the experience more manageable during a difficult time.

Sanctioned by the judge for her unscrupulous tactics and behavior.

Ms. Boysen was opposing counsel, but in my opinion, if you’re looking for a more meritorious litigator, you should look elsewhere.

Gained absolutely nothing more for her client than the previous attorney, and more than quadrupled said client’s legal fees.

So, she is great at racking up billable hours. That is certain.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I just want to make it clear that I represented your (now) ex-wife, not you. Thank you for taking the time to leave a review on our page.
**Edit - Thank you for adding more to your review. It appears you have made many additions. I believe your ex-wife unequivocally disagrees with your assessment, as do I. Your statements are false and misleading. I don't think anyone in that suit is impressed with your behavior and I hope you find something better to do with your time moving forward.

reviews.text: All this hard work? She wasn’t ever anvailable to annswer questions! She really screwed me over  and I don’t have my child back ! Most importantly she left me when I needed her the most! I do NOT RECOMMEND if you want someone who cares about money go ahead choose her ! reviews.ownerResponse: Can you please provide your name so I can determine whether you were an actual client and so I may properly respond?

reviews.text: I genuinely don’t think I could say enough good things about Lauren and her entire staff. A divorce and especially a divorce with kids is a very hard, very emotional chapter in your life, and there is nobody I would rather have by my side than Lauren.  Before I met Lauren I was with another law firm (I don’t recommend Youngblood), that did NOT have my best interest at heart. So I fired them and hired Lauren on the spot. My ex husband is next level difficult and his attorney was to match. But neither of them held a candle to Lauren. She is a shark in the court room and one bad a$$ boss babe. When she is not in the court room her and her staff are working hard for their clients to find not only big wins, but little wins as well. Her law office’s communication was phenomenal, very detail oriented, and they have superior knowledge to top it off. At the end of the day Lauren and her staff care more about their clients best interest vs how much money they can make off them. Never once did I question their loyalty to themselves (unlike my previous attorney) above their loyalty to me. Ive referred many of my personal clients to them and they couldn’t be happier as well . This review might seem a little over-the-top, but I am a firm believer in giving credit when credit is due. If you need an attorney who is going to give you a win, then don’t just hire Lauren, but run to hire her.

Lauren took my case personally, and represented me the way shed represent herself. She does not play when it comes to her clients! I really appreciate her and her entire team for everything they've done for me and my kids.
Great people

Lauren held my hand through the entire process. Literally. She saw how scared I was of the entire thing, but her and her team are some of the most kind and empathetic people I’ve ever met. I loved the open line of communication, I could message them whenever I needed, and they’d be very swift with a reply. I spoke to MANY attorneys before I chose Lauren, and she was the only attorney I spoke to where it seemed like she genuinely CARED about me, my story, and my child. She fought very hard, aggressively, and with passion. She made me very prepared and did so much to ease my anxiety. Other attorneys told me what I needed couldn’t be done. But she fought so hard that what seemed impossible to other attorneys, was a walk in the park for her. I’d recommend Lauren to anyone. Eternally grateful !!!
She's a fighter a savage and does her job very well!! You don't want to choose wrong, Lauren boysen and her team care, they fight!! And get results!!! I WILL NEVER hire another law office.

Lauren and her team are absolutely awesome. My wife and I were squeezed in to see her on April 12 due to it being an emergency. She went over everything with us an is giving us the help we deserve. We are truly thankful for her and her team. I highly recommend her. She gets straight to the point, and works with you on what exactly you want. Thank you for everything you’ve done for us so far.
The best lawyer, in all of Fort Worth! If you need help with custody issues, child, support, visitations, or anything you can’t find a better attorney!

Lauren L. Boysen is the best! She gets it done expeditiously! She has helped me and other friends of mine with cases, and she has ALWAYS come through! She is kind, compassionate, honest, and a woman of the people. I recommend her to anyone seeking legal assistance. You Will Not be Disappointed!

I have absolutely loved having Lauren and her team represent me. The communication, the teamwork, and the pssion they have for what they do is truly inspiring. They have done a fabulous job. They truly care about you and your family! I wouldn’t trust anyone else.

Lauren Boysen of the Law Office of Lauren L. Boysen, PLLC is an exceptional lawyer whose dedication to her clients is truly unmatched. I wholeheartedly recommend Lauren Boysen to anyone in need of legal counsel; her professionalism, empathy, and unwavering support make her a standout attorney in her field.
Very sad

Lauren and her team are here for the right reasons. They are honest, dedicated, helpful and supportive through each step. Professional and caring

Lauren and her team are amazing. Lauren passionately advocates for her clients in and out of the court room. This is a superwomen team of highly educated and experienced law professionals. To hire Laurent Boysen and her legal team was the best decision I to protect my rights and my child’s family life too. I highly recommend them.

Lauren is such an amazing attorney! Saying she will have your back and get you what you deserve by any means necessary is an understatement when it comes to her. Lauren and her team are amazing human beings! They are smart, confident, and kind! I highly recommend them for any family law needs.
I cannot say enough good things about Lauren! She and her team are amazing ❤️❤️

Lauren and her team worked diligently for me to get my babies back, they are truly advocates for father’s rights.. they gave me hope for the first time after my kids were kept from me for 86 days and she got them back for me. I have pending cases and attorney Allen is my attorney I have to say by far this is one of the best attorneys I’ve came across. He will always deliver and keep it straight up with you.. he has went to the extremes in order for me to keep my freedom and I haven’t even paid him as of now.
Always returns my phone calls even when He’s on vacation and did all he can to help me .... my case is on going n I’m sure I’ll be able to deliver even better news as a conclusion. He is a intelligent, smart and a very professional n kind person  and I can’t thank him enough for all he’s done for me so far ... me and my family are really happy n I’m happy to have him on my team Forreal
if you need a attorney in Tarrant county attorney Allen is the attorney you need 💯
Thank you again Mr.Allen
God bless you and all your loved ones 🙏🏽

Mr. Blake is outstanding attorney who has the depth of knowledge and the attitude necessary to navigate complicated legal matters. He is highly personable and responsive when it comes to interaction with clients. I'm grateful for the excellent job he did and would recommend him to my family and friends.

I'm in the process of looking for a probate lawyer, and Mr. Blake has been extremely helpful. He has gone above and beyond what any lawyer would and he hasn't been hired yet. I felt obligated to leave review based on these circumstances and when the time comes- He will be the guy!

My mother & I found out that I would be facing a total of four charges, two misdemeanors & two felonies. The day I had my ankle monitor placed on my ankle we did not have an attorney representing me at the moment. My mother went to countless attorneys to just get an idea of what I was facing and how much they would charge her. All of the attorneys besides Mr Blake said they needed money upfront before discussing my case. Mr Blake was very patient, informative and realistic through out this entire process. While we were gathering the funds to hire Mr Blake he was still communicating with my mother in regards to the status of my case and never pressure us to hire him. We hired Mr Blake two months before trial I believe and he made sure I understood the worst case scenario of taking the case to trial. Throughout the entire process he always made my family & I feel at ease. One day before trial that's when we received a plea deal from the DA to drop all 3 of the charges and serve x amount of years on deferred probabation. After weighing the pros & cons I decided to accept because that was the only charge they could hammer me on only due to a technicality. This has been the hardest situation I've ever had to overcome & I do not see myself overcoming this if it wasn't for Mr Blake. I hope no one ever has to go through what I went through but if you ever get yourself in a tight situation I would only trust one lawyer with my life and that is Mr Blake! Thanks Merry Christmas & Happy New Years!

Mr. Blake was extremely helpful while dealing with finalizing my Aunt's estate.  The compassion, professionalism, and personal attention we received during this difficult time made the process so much easier.  I would highly recommend Mr. Blake for any of your legal needs.
Eric Reyes law firm was the absolute best , no hassle . Beatriz is the best around
Excellent experience from start to finish. Very professional, communicative, and truly caring. He genuinely took the time to answer my questions! Highly recommend Mr. Reyes

reviews.text:

Beatriz got me setup with a Doctor, x-rays, mri, Physical Therapy, and I went to a medical massage therapist once a week. Omni Massage & Guidance is the best! Anyways, after all that went on for 3 months, the insurance company was still trying to low-ball us. Mr Reyes assured me they were offering a reasonable amount, since they're not going to risk a lawsuit, but when I raised that gross negligence would expose the insurance company's client to injunctive consequences, Beatriz kept hammering them to pay more. They went up $8000 more AFTER Mr. Reyes said they probably wouldn't go up anymore. So, something to keep in mind. It's always a gamble, but if you know you deserve more...

DO NOT USE THIS FIRM!  In the beginning when they were hungry for our case after an accident they were great.  After they asked me to move my family over to another lawyer because we were suing the lady at fault they said they would still represent me.  Well shortly after I kept getting a bill from a doctor which I thought was weird so back in October I started to leave message after message for Morelia R.to please call me about the bill.  4 months later after trying over and over again I get someone to tell me my case was rejected but, couldn’t explain why.  Catalina was the worst with her customer service telling me “You are not going to be talking over me” when I was trying to explain the situation. So someone calls to tell me I was notified back in October that it was a conflict of interest to represent me also since they know my families case. Funny thing is we never got a notice?? They claimed it was sent back in October but couldn’t verify what day it was sent?  I searched every way possible to find the “email” but never found it.   After getting off the phone with the “supervisor “ I shortly got the rejection email.   Funny when I searched for the same name Morelia the only one that it found was from yesterday even though she was said to have sent it back in October.  When I asked again for the date of the October email I was told by Hamza H. That I am now aware of it and to go find another lawyer. Now they are sticking me with a $4000.00 bill that they had to approve prior to me getting the procedure.  So if you are looking for customer service where it doesn’t take 4 months to get a call(and I was not from my caseworker) I would highly suggest you find a different law firm to represent you.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. Muscle:
I'm very sorry to hear about your experience with your lawyer. However, my records do not reflect that we have ever represented you regarding any legal matter. Additionally, my office does not employ any person by the name of Catalina, Morelia R, or Hamza H.
My office is located in Bedford Texas. Please check your records and remove your Google review at your earliest convenience.
I wish you best of luck regarding your claim.
Eric Reyes Law Firm

Rude.
Literally had one simple question, not even about how to go about a civil case.
I was just going to ask whether I put the defendants name or the company’s name on the petition I am filing. That’s it. Nothing else.
I was told he doesn’t answer questions, so I hung up.
Glad it was early enough in the conversation so I didn’t have to deal with a bad attitude.

*update to owners reply, as I can’t find the reply button*

No, he WAS in fact rude.

There was no need to carry-on with the conversation, as your eye-rolling tone was clearly evident - so yes, I hung up.

Yes, I have called many auto shops to ask SIMPLE question that I did not know, but they, unlike you, were kind enough to answer. Because they know that might have earned my business in the future.

I didn’t need your representation at the moment, just a simple question answered.

You are the type that give lawyers such bad reputations and fit the stereo-type.

Good day.
reviews.ownerResponse: Unfortunately our office cannot answer questions all day.  That would be all we do.  We only have on resource to sell our time.  If we spend time answering random questions during the day ot takes time from our clients.  I was not rude and he hung up on me before I had a chance to say we offer a flat fee option for representation in small claims court.  One would not expect to call a doctors office or autos hop and ask questions of those professionals without being a customer or a patient. It is the same for an attorney.

Response to Owner:
I have never spoken to you and have simply been in the background of conversations you have had with my family. I have no connection towards you besides you being a bad person to my family. Your “house call” was dropping papers off and leaving. You were very aware the short drive was very difficult because I heard what was said in the phone call, and made sure to communicate how it was a strain on them. It was a month or two before cancer had taken their life and they could barely get out of bed, but you said there was absolutely no way. When in reality you did not want to hire a notary and bring witnesses to their home because it was too much work and money. My advice for you, sir, is to focus on more surface level cases because you are apparently unable to connect to families on an emotional level and have empathy.

If you’re looking for a law firm to handle to veterans pension, this is a solid choice. Better safe than sorry. You don’t want to leave it to chance. Two thumbs up!

Corliss Birks of Clifton Coufal was entirely professional, kind, patient, and friendly. Long story short--she secured VA benefits for my mom months ahead of what I expected based on conversations with my Air Force aunt, and those extra months of benefits more than offset the law firm fee. Hey, if you know someone honorably discharged from the US armed forces, or a surviving spouse, or child--if they aren't getting VA benefits call Clifton Coufal, ask for Corliss, and she'll let you know what is possible. My mom is getting a lot of money from the VA. Maybe you can too!

Clifton Coufal Law Firm did an outstanding job helping me gather and submit all my father's documents for his VA benefits. I only wish I would have called them sooner rather than struggling to pull things together before I called! Christian Stringer was fantastic to work with - Highly Recommend!! Call them now!

My brother and I worked with Clifton Coufal Law Firm for 2 months to gather documents, fill our forms, and provide all that was needed to attain a VA Pension for my blind brother, who served in the Army back into the 70's.  The CCL Firm was extremely helpful in assisting  the necessary documents / Information to get this Pension funded.  They did it in a Professional manner and everything was explained to the finest detail.  I am so HAPPY I had them on my side.  UPDATE:  February 2025;  Pension approved and couldn't be happier!
GREAT JOB Clifton Coufal Law Firm

Clifton Coufal Law Firm and their employees have been a tremendous blessing to us. Christian Springer and Michael Sawilowsky helped us get benefits for my father and stepmother even coming to our location to complete the paperwork. Michael took the extra time to visit with my father on a personal level making him feel valued as a person and not just a client. My father has now passed away and again they have helped us get benefits for my stepmother with no additional charges. We are forever grateful to them and have already recommended them to others.

I can't say enough good things about Michael Sawilowsky at Clifton Coufal Law Firm.  He was so patient and compassionate with my parents during the entire process.  I have been, and will continue to recommend this law firm to Veterans.

This law firm was very helpful including Rachel Mott. They help me submit all the paperwork to VA for pension benefits. I can’t say enough about them in their efficiency and support. I highly recommend them for any of your needs.

I loved every bit of my experience working with this Law firm! I'm so glad I met Michelle at an event. This Law firm can help so many families when planning for the future of seniors. Very compassionate. Very well educated!!! Must use!!!

Clifton Coufal Law Firm helped us get VA Spousal Benefits for our mom. Their hard work and dedication to Veteran families is incredible! We worked with Corliss and she was exceptional! She was very detailed and communicated with us as we waited to be approved. I highly recommend them!
Excellent Customer service. Kade and Christian were great to work with. Understood need and made it easy. Very professional and personable. I would highly recommend their services.
They were absolutely amazing. They helped with my father's veteran benefits application and it was incredibly helpful.

This company took the hard work out of our hands to get this great Veterans Benefit that we knew nothing about. All the staff I interacted with here really cared about helping me get the benefits I needed.   I was treated as a member of the family.  They willingly answered any and all questions I had.  They relayed the progress of my claim at all steps.  They were excited for me when I finally received my first payment.  Thank you everyone.

If I could them 10 stars I would.  Michael & his team at the Fort Worth office have been beyond amazing to work with.  It all started with getting my 87 yr old Mom's affairs in order last year.   They made everything go so smoothly and actually drove to Cleburne for her to sign the papers.   They really took their time to explain everything & made superb recommendations to fit what my Mother needed done.

Now my husband & I are working with them on getting some of our Estate Planning done.  They really care about their clients and the families.  I highly recommend this Law Firm for whatever Estate Planning is needed.
It was a great experience working with the team at Clifton Coufal!  They made the process simple and painless and they achieved awesome results for my family.

I am very happy to recommend Clifton Coufal Law Firm! This firm was thorough with and attentive to details in the application process for a Veteran's benefit for my mother. Thank you, Corliss Birks, for keeping me in the loop and answering questions all along the way. My family is very appreciative!

Kade and his team did a great job assisting my 99 year old mother to receive the VA benefits earned by the greatest generation.  Their communication and attention to detail is second to none.  My family would highly recommend trusting their firm in assisting in your legal needs

Clifton Coufal Law Firm should receive more than a5 star rating. Each employee that I talked with exhibited an efficient yet caring attitude toward my family as we worked our way through the process of applying for the VA benefit for my daddy.  When he passed away the firm was on the ready again to walk us through the process again for my mama. We couldn’t have gotten through it without them. Special shoutout to Kade King for always taking my calls, answering my questions and coming up with solutions for any and all problems that popped up. I would feel very confident in referring this firm to anyone especially applying for VA related benefits.

Caufel law firm was very kind, patient and helpful getting my dads benefits for my 93 yr old mother. I am so grateful for their assistance. I could not have done it without their guidance. Thank you so much!!!
The firm has been a lifesaver as I have navigated managing my mother's care and assets as she transitioned from independent living to assisted living.

Clifton Coufal Law Firm, was in the process of working with my dad on trying to get his pension that he earned serving in the Koren war.
They were very helpful and caring.  Corliss Birks, was our processor in getting this filed with the VA.  She went out of her way to get this going to be able to have his pension before he passed away. I would recommend them on your needs.  Thank you Corliss very much for what you did.
Sincerely

We appreciate the guidance and assistance provided by Clifton Coufal Law Firm in helping my brother to acquire his military pension. It is a lengthy and often frustrating  journey but with their help, our mission was accomplished. I highly recommend them to anyone needing their VA pension.

I specifically asked Maria did that include Medstar, and she said yes. About a week after i received my payment of barely $2000 Medstar put a derogatory mark on my credit for right at $2000. I called and spoke with Maria and she said that wasnt included I  needed to pay it on my own. Now fast forward to today and I get another derogatory mark on my credit for  an imaging bill from this same accident.  This time for $1500. There is no way I would've settled for something that would leave me with $3500 worth of debt.  I don't know what bills they paid if its all on my credit report. If there was a way to sue this law office I would, but I'm sure there is a board I can report them to for their unethical practices. I have each email corospondance I made with lying Maria Fernandez. I fired them and asked them for partial refund and they said I still owed them about 1000 because of the text, voicemail and emails they sent me. I would not mind what they charged me if they had actually gotten me something. They did nothing. I hired another law firm. What this law firm could not do in almost a year, my new attorney did in less than two months. Save your money and hire another firm. I was unlawfully taking to jail in Euless back in March of 2023. The officer pulled me over for a traffic violation. Once I showed him I wasn't intoxicated and in fact I was out driving for a rideshare company to do my part to help slow down DWI's or worse.

Well once he seen that I wasn't intoxicated he wanted to search my person. Which I allowed and told him that I had a Delta 8 Vape Pin. Which I got from a Vape store. He asked to see it looked at it and instantly told me it was THC and was illegal. Since I had my firearm with me he took me to jail om a unlawful carry charge.

After a couple days inside and finally getting judge. She gave me a PR bond and my friend instantly told me to get Dunham and Jones Attorneys.

The best advice I have received in a long time. For this to be my first non traffic charge I was just going to let it go. That was until the state wanted to destroy my firearm . I was 100% out on that due to I had done nothing wrong. So we had man cases and then finally this July we had to hearing for Motion to Supress. And for the first time I seen exactly how a good lawyer works.

My attorney Mark Streiff absolutely took it to both the prosecution and the "former" officer that arrested me. Mark was well prepared and asked the perfect questions during his cross examination of the prosecutions witness.

I was very impressed and satisfied with the results of the hearing. I was able to get my firearm back and the change was dismissed due to the office not having any right to search me or my vehicle after I proved to him I was sober.

I would advise anyone who gets in any kind of situation with the law that you be quite and contact Dunham and Jones Attorneys. And while your at it ask for Mark Streiff and team. I promise that you they will make sure to dot all I's and cross all T's.

Mark also gave me a great referral for someone who can help me get the compensation I've missed since this issue set me back financially since March.

Many lawyers like to scare you so you pay them and feel good about it. This firm didn’t use scammy tactics. They were quick to say if they could help and how much it would cost. Jon Greig represented me. Very professional from start to finish and did a great job at keeping me updated on the case.

I was rear ended in September 2022 and have only spoken to the office twice without me calling them, 1st when they came out to my home to discuss the case and 2nd when they needed information for my paperwork. The first time is the only time I've seen it talked to the actual lawyer. As someone else explained, they do send you a letter stating that you should not expect much communication because they are working on handling the case.

Well after almost 2 years since my accident, I have received no real updates unless I called and when I do, they basically tell me not to call anymore and they'll call me. Since this was my first experience working with a lawyer, I trusted them and have only called once every few months so you would think I was calling like every week or something.

After all of this time, my car was totalled and I ended up owing the car loan. Now they're telling me that they keep receiving offers so low for the medical part of my injury that it may not even cover the medical bills. They're saying that we all may need to go to court but I'm on the verge of looking for another lawyer because I don't even trust that they'll fight for my case when they know barely anything about me.

So far, worse experience and several of my friends have gotten into car accidents over the last couple of years and have received substantial settlements, which I wasn't even asking for. All I'm asking is that the expenses that I incurred be taken care of.  Why should I come out of my own pocket when I was the one rear ended???

I am thankful for the services provided by the Law Offices of David S. If y’all want an attorney who is thorough, explores every available option, and fights to get you what you deserve, then look no further than Barrow Law. Wade and his team absolutely fought for me. They did everything they could. Then, and ONLY then did we make the executive decision to close the case after Wade exhausted every effort that he could to pursue an at-fault party from my motorcycle accident.

Wade and Cindy and team are knowledgeable, quick to respond, and they actually answer their phones. :) That alone puts them head-and-shoulders above other law offices.

Look, you can contact a thousand other firms. And that’s fine. But speaking from experience with Wade, you’d just be wasting your time. While most other places will give you the run-around and leave you frustrated with unanswered questions, Barrow Law will get you the answers that you seek, and will do it in timely order. The choice is up to you. But my recommendation is to save yourself the undue and unwarranted headaches, and just call Barrow Law. You can thank me later…

Wade at Barrow Law represented me after being hit by a drunk driver in 2024. The level of attention I got from Mr. Barrow and his Legal Assistant Cindy in our first interaction made my choice in which attorney to hire incredibly easy. Wade is not some billboard lawyer that you never meet, he and his staff are real people who understand the frustration and interruption that being hit by a dui driver causes. Not only did I get more money from my settlement than expected, he and Cindy took all the stress out of the process for me. They handled every part of the claim process out of my hands and maintained excellent communication throughout the settlement process. I hope to never need a personal injury attorney again but if I do, I know exactly who I’m going to - truly, I can’t recommend them enough

Borrow Law has helped my family and I tremendously. Through hard times and difficult moments they have always had our backs. Thank you for everything.

And the driver who hit me I hope
and pray you get off the streets and never hit anyone else. The trauma I have now…

reviews.text: Attorney Artemio Fernández is 100% recommended. He is a professional, honest, and provides effective and ethical advice. He answers any questions I have and resolved my case very quickly. I am very grateful.

I am beyond grateful for Artemio Fernandez and his entire team. From start to finish, they made the whole process quick, smooth, and so much less stressful for me and my family. They were always professional, attentive, and truly cared about our case. I highly recommend them to anyone in need of an injury lawyer. Forever thankful!
—Karyme Morales

I can’t say enough good things about Artemio and his staff. From the very beginning, he made an overwhelming situation feel manageable and supported. He was so easy to work with, and his staff was absolutely amazing! Everyone is so kind, responsive, and truly caring every step of the way. You can tell Artemio genuinely cares about his clients and will fight hard to get you what you deserve. The entire process was seamless, and I always felt like I was in good hands. I’m incredibly thankful I found him and would recommend him to anyone without hesitation.
This Law Office does an amazing job. Dealt with my case and made it easy for me since the beginning all the way to the end. Definitely will recommend any chance I get when needed!! Satisfied human✅
Artemio was such a huge help with my first accident involving injuries. He walked me through each step, explained everything clearly, and always made sure I felt reassured throughout the process.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I can’t say enough good things about Attorney Artemio Fernandez! I’ve had to call on him not once, not twice, but three times, and every single time he delivered outstanding results—winning my cases without ever needing to go to trial.

Nobody wants to need an attorney, but if you do, you want someone like Artemio on your side. He and his team make the legal process feel simple and stress-free.

What sets him apart is how easy he is to reach and how approachable he is. He’s professional, knowledgeable, and highly skilled, but he’s also incredibly relatable and never intimidating. He takes the time to explain things clearly and genuinely cares about his clients.

If you’re looking for a personal injury attorney in Texas who will fight hard (AF) for you while also making you feel supported every step of the way, I highly recommend Artemio Fernandez. He’s earned my trust time and time again!
Artemio was awesome! He made the whole process easy, always kept me updated, and really cared about helping me. I couldn’t have asked for a better attorney
I would definitely recommend Artemio Fernandez he helped me out in every way possible. Explained and kept me updated with everything 10/10. Amazing guy who will ensure his all!

The Law office of Artimo Fernandez is definitely one of the best Law firms I could have ever gone to.

With tears in my eyes due to a car accident me and my son were in due to the other individual was not paying attention and we we're rear ended while we were stopped at a stoplight I had a miscarriage because of this accident and me and my son were a little bit hurt.

Taking this claim / case to Mr. Fernandez has been the best and right decision I could ever make, not only was he kind, gentle and very concerned about me and my son he showed the utmost sympathy in the loss of my baby and with everything that we had gone through.

With that said he put all his hard work and sweat and I know he did into this and he won my case.

I highly refer the Law office of Artimo Fernandez for any case whether you're injured you've lost a baby etc. I know 100% he will be there to help you. I can finally say I can move on now and this was all thanks to him and his team at his Law office.

With tears of happiness and not pain I am finally moving, we are finally moving forward.

Thank you again to the Law office of Artimo Fernandez and his team!

Excellent experience! The law firm was not only knowledgeable and professional but also genuinely cared about my case. They guided me through every step, ensuring I understood the process and felt supported. I highly recommend their services.
My experience from the beginning to the end went smoothly, I want to thank The Law Office of Artemio Fernandez for helping me during my need of help after my car accident.

Very great lawyer. I wasn't gonna go through with a settlement. Had too many situations going on. But, he talked me into it. Got it all done for me. Thank you, Artemino. I recommend you guys have him represent you. He will get the job done.

I am extremely satisfied with the work of Artemio and his legal team. They were incredibly knowledgeable about personal injury car incidents and expertly navigated a complex case. Artemio's strategic approach and attention to detail were key to achieving a positive outcome for me. I would highly recommend them to anyone seeking a skilled and experienced lawyer in personal injury.

I had the pleasure of working with Artemio Fernández for my accident case, and I couldn’t be more satisfied with the experience. From the very beginning, he was incredibly attentive and took the time to explain every step of the process. He was always available to answer my questions, no matter how big or small, and made sure I felt supported throughout the entire case. Beyond his professionalism, he was also genuinely friendly and easy to talk to, which made a stressful situation much more manageable. Thanks to his dedication and expertise, he secured the best possible outcome for me. I 100% recommend his services to anyone in need of a great lawyer.

Amazing to work with and comforting to say the least. Artemio and his team are professional and they care about their clients. He listens carefully and is detailed in explaining how your process and filings work. Definitely would refer others and will return when needed.
10/10 experience didn’t have to do any paperwork until the end just sign and collect :)

I had an excellent experience working with Artemio Fernandez and his team. From start to finish, they made the entire process smooth and stress-free. Artemio communicated clearly and consistently, so I always knew what was happening with my case. What impressed me most was how quickly everything was resolved—my case was closed in under six months! His staff was also professional, friendly, and very supportive throughout the process. I’m truly grateful for their help and highly recommend Artemio Fernandez to anyone in need of legal representation.

I was hurt! At a complete stop I was rear ended. I had my arms stretched out holding the steering wheel and BaM! My son was months and it hurt to carry him. I stayed home year to care for him and I couldn't. I want to thank Mr. Fernandez for helping me get treated and guiding me through this process. Honest, patient in explaining every step and his staff checking in. To me it speaks a lot when the attorney takes the time to reach out to me. Highly recommend!

Artemio is awesome. He helped me after an accident, and was incredibly helpful. Throughout the process, he consistently gave updates without me having to even ask. I imagine that you get way more personalized service with him than with one of those giant law firms. I’m very satisfied with the result!

What a great lawyer!! My case lasted a long time but throughout the whole time he kept me update the whole time. Even though my case was a little complicated he was able to resolve it. Plus, his team is also amazing. They would keep me updated as well with a positive attitude. I would HIGHLY recommend Artemio Fernandez!

Highly recommend! Artemio helped me when I got into a car accident. He thoroughly explained the process to me and always kept me updated with any new information on my case! Him and his team are professional and you can tell he cares about his customers. I was very pleased with his work and the outcome of my case. I would use Artemio again and recommend him to anyone.

Car accidents are never ideal situations but after my first accident where I almost gave up - Artemio took my case in, made sure I knew I was in good hands and got me a great deal. His office made sure everything went smoothly where I never worried about my end result. They take these cases head on with their best foot forward. I could not recommend him enough!!!

I am grateful to lawyer Artemio and his assistant. They were with me throughout a year-long process, and everything finally worked out. The lawyer is a very honest person; he always kept me informed. Thank you 🙏🏻

Even though everything look to be against me on my case Artemio took me on as a client. His office always kept me in the loop of everything and everything went on at a reasonable pace . I’m very thankful for their efforts for helping me win my case.

If I could give more than 5 Stars I would. Artemio went above and beyond for me and my son. Keeps you updated during the process.  I had a bad experience prior with other law firms. Definitely will recommend family and friends

Positive Positive Positive experience with Mr. Fernandez from the beginning to the end of this journey. He kept me informed throughout each step of this unfortunate incident that brought to his services. I highly recommend him.

Artemio has been my go-to attorney for many years. His streamline process is seemless, from contacting insurance agencies, obtaining medical records, and finding me treatment providers his office took care of it all. This allowed me to focus on my recovery journey and took the stress off of my shoulders. He fought to make sure I got the best settlement while constantly providing me with updates. I can not recommend him and his office enough!

He provides such a personalized experience. This office handled my step mother’s case and shortly I also had to call Artemio. He remembers his clients, is attentive, communicates well and keeps you updated!!
He himself called the insurance to get us into a rental same day, he ensured we were taken care of quick. Will keep referring him!

Artemio Fernandez handled my case and did an outstanding job! Made this process very smooth and stress free for me. Any issues or concerns were immediately addressed, always answered my questions and kept me updated with my case. I’m beyond pleased with the results, definitely recommend The Law Office of Artemio Fernandez!
Excellent attorney who will help you when you need it the most. If you are looking for a personal injury attorney, look no further than Artemio.
Excellent Lawyer! Artemio and his team made sure to always keep me updated throughout every step of the way & never left me with questions or doubts! 10/10 recommend!

Artemio helped me out with my accident. He kept me updated with any new information never had me waiting I can definitely tell he cares about his clients. I was very please with his work I would Definitely recommend Artemio to anyone.

This guy cares about his clients. I’ve had the pleasure to know Mr. Fernandez for the last few years in working with him on clients in the Fort Worth area, and his attention to detail is extraordinary. Definitely recommend.

I was involved in my first car wreck awhile back and I honestly didn’t know what to do or expect. Artemio helped me out during this unpleasant experience. Artemio is an excellent attorney who is very knowledgeable about legal matters and uses his knowledge to advocate for his clients. He is also bilingual.

Artemio helped out my dad when he suffered an accident last year. Artemio was quick to respond to any of our questions and concerns.  Not only did he make sure my dad got the treatment he needed, but also got him paid even when the other person did not have insurance. He always had my best interest in mind unlike other attorneys who care more about themselves than their clients. Definitely recommend him!!!
Great service. Very responsive and helpful. I highly recommend!

Artemio took in my sister as his first client, she had no where to turn and no idea what to do in order to get something in motion to help her with her accident. Awesome service! The attorney always kept me up to date and got me a great settlement really fast.

Very professional and gave very great updates of how my case was going , when you gave them a call quick responses same day… all and all I give them 5 star service

My experience with Welch Law Firm and Mr. Welch regarding my QDRO (Qualified Domestic Relations Order) case has been very disappointing. From the start, communication has been inconsistent and unreliable. I was given specific dates and times when I would receive updates, yet those commitments were not kept.

On one occasion, my granddaughter rearranged her schedule to be present for a scheduled call, only for us to find out—without any prior notice—that Mr. Welch was in court and unavailable. This lack of communication caused unnecessary inconvenience for both of us.

I understand that court obligations and delays can happen, but as a client, I believe it is a basic professional responsibility to honor your word or at least communicate in advance if plans change. Too often, I was left following up myself to get information that should have been provided proactively.

Clear, timely communication is critical in legal matters—especially in something as important as a QDRO—and unfortunately, that has not been my experience here. I expected better organization, respect for my time, and follow-through on promises made.

The Rocky Walton Law Firm was absolutely incredible to work with. Greg Jackson and his team went above and beyond, ultimately recovering 100% of the available insurance in our case.
We knew from the start this was going to be an uphill battle. The at-fault driver falsely claimed he had a green light, and the initial accident report incorrectly stated that I ran a red light. To make matters worse, no one ever contacted me to get my side of the story from the police department.
Greg and his team didn’t stop there after seeing the accident report. He listed to my side of the story and cared. Through thorough investigation, they were able to locate a witness who had been sitting in their car directly behind me when our light turned green—confirming that I was not at fault. Thanks to their dedication and hard work, the case was settled out of court.
If you're looking for a team that is skilled, determined, and truly cares about getting justice, I highly recommend the Rocky Walton Law Firm.

Update 3/7/26: Norred Law (Owner), you are telling a bold-faced lie. How disgusting. You sent me an email after you returned from a “long vacation” (your words) stating that you would get to the bottom of the issue with Chad as you did not know what was going on—not me—and then I never heard from you again.

Don’t try to frame this as me being upset simply because I left a valid and factual one-star review. If anything, it should have been zero stars. I’m not retracting anything I stated in my review.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Candice, I have tried to contact you multiple times about this matter. From what I can tell, you came in, Mr. Lampe gave you an analysis of your situation, but you are now giving us a one-star because you didn't like the results of the analysis.

I would very much like to hear what you mean by "being warned about Chad's limited and ineffective experience," and why, if that was true, you'd "give him a chance."

From what I can tell, you've taken his advice, and you are just mad because you didn't like his conclusion. If you don't think he was competent, then it seems you should not do what he suggested. And having taken his advice, it seems like a one-star review is unfair. Weird.

Second Response: I sent you the email that you didn't respond to (that you agree you received, and which had my cell on it), and then I called you a couple of days later. Multiple times. And I still don't understand what the problem was or is. Good day.

reviews.text: Warren Norred agreed to represent me in a matter I had originally filed pro se. I paid a $10,000 retainer and clearly communicated my priorities for how the representation should proceed. Over the course of several months, some basic filings were made to keep the case active. However, the central objective I retained him to pursue was not advanced. Instead, time was spent developing a different legal direction despite my written instructions that it was not my priority at that stage. Communication was a persistent problem. Many of my emails and directives went unanswered. When I eventually sent an email requesting accountability, I asked that fees spent on work I had not authorized be credited toward the work I had actually requested. He refused and promptly filed a motion to withdraw as counsel. In my experience, the $10,000 retainer and several months of time were largely consumed without advancing the objective I had clearly communicated from the beginning. That time and money would have been better spent retaining competent counsel.
reviews.ownerResponse:
C.G., about half of what you wrote is true. You tried to bypass the need for an attorney by filing what should have been a federal lawsuit, using AI to draft the suit, filing it in a Dallas district court, and finding out the hard way that your suit was terminally flawed.

In our firm, you have a record for the longest consultation in our 17-year history. I listened to your entire story, went through the filed-and-failing lawsuit, and developed a strategy...that you later rejected.

We had what seems like the same conversation several times, and each time, I thought we came to an understanding that would recalibrate your situation.

The problem is that we would talk, and you'd eventually agree that your position was wrong, and then you'd decide *later* that you were really right, and we'd have to repeat the process.

I would happily show the whole world the extent of the email communications and let reasonable observers see how many times I had to repeatedly correct your "understanding" of law, but you would never agree to that, would you?

The fact is that you refused to even let me withdraw. You wrote, in opposition to my motion to withdraw, the following:

"The issues described in counsel's motion-discussions over strategy and counsel's ability to communication are ordinary and remediable professional matters. They do not, on their face, constitute the type of good cause contemplated by Rule 10 of the Texas Rules of Civil Procedure, which requires a sufficient showing to justify withdrawal during active litigation."

Those are *your* words, that *you* filed, in the docket of the District Courts of Dallas. You wanted me to continue to do useless things that were based on your ChatGPT research, which I showed you over and over was wrong.

Any reasonable observer can look at the public filings of the case, and see that you wanted me to continue working for you, though you weren't paying me in the manner we agreed, and you were also refusing to take my advice.

You wanted me to continue representing you, in spite of the fact that you weren't paying for continued representation or taking my advice, and you filed oppositions to my motion to withdraw twice. We agreed that you'd maintain a trust, but you wanted me to work in hopes of future wins. That's not what we agreed to do.

You have a decent case - it is unfortunate that you refuse to take the advice needed to succeed on it.

Again, if you want to release me from my duty to maintain confidentiality, I'd be happy to let people see our communications, talk about the number of emails, see your "unanswered" emails, and let everyone see who was being rational, and you was not.

In spite of all that, I wish you the best of luck. Be sure to show this review to the next attorney and let them know that all good deeds will be punished.

reviews.text:
I called the office last week to inquire about legal representation, and unfortunately the experience left a very poor impression.

The first thing I noticed was that the woman who answered the phone sounded absolutely miserable, which immediately brought my expectations and enthusiasm for the firm down quite a few pegs. As the conversation continued and I explained the type of attorney I was looking for, her attitude only seemed to worsen. Getting basic information felt like pulling teeth, and the interaction felt rushed and unwelcoming.

Eventually, she confirmed that the firm does handle cases like mine and offered to set up a meeting with someone else. However, by that point, I was so turned off by the interaction, her attitude, and what it communicated about the firm as a whole that I decided to take my business elsewhere.

Thankfully, today I found another firm that was genuinely excited to take my case. I had no hesitation handing over the $15,000 retainer they requested because I am willing to pay for the level of professionalism and respect clients deserve.

I hope management is able to coach whoever answered the phone, as first impressions matter greatly. I can only imagine how many paying clients and how much business may have been lost due to similar interactions.
reviews.ownerResponse: This is a fake review. All our incoming calls are recorded. This never happened "last week" or any time in the month prior. The account established to create this review has never done anything except make this review. We suspect that the "review" is an attempt to get back at us from a previous suit where we were successful against the person making this review. Google should take this down.

reviews.text: Warren Norred is an amazing attorney, who anyone can tell is passionate about what he does. His staff is second to none, and everyone we spoke to was very well-spoken, organized, and helpful.  They did a great job explaining next steps, and they always did what they said they were going to do. The consultation with Warren that we paid for was worth every cent (especially in comparison to several other consultations we had - some free, and some paid for).  During our meeting with Warren Norred, we received some very solid advice, and he was very adept at clearly explaining our legal options, as well as several different avenues/strategies we could choose from.  He helped us gain clarity & direction, which is what we were seeking most. We are so grateful for Warren and his team, and truly appreciate all of the help and support they have provided us during such a stressful time.  It's not easy dealing with a corrupt school district where they abuse the use of CTWs (Criminal Trespass Warnings) in order to try and silence parents who speak up for their children when their rights have been violated.  Norred Law was the group that outshined & outperformed all of the other attorneys' offices that we interviewed, and I would definitely refer them to any of our family and friends, should the need ever arise. reviews.text:
Exceptional Support for My Car Accident Case
I was recently involved in a car accident while on vacation in Texas, and as an Oregon resident, navigating the legal process across state lines felt overwhelming. Thankfully, I reached out to Herz Law Firm, and their team made the entire experience manageable, professional, and stress-free. Their commitment to clarity and communication truly sets them apart.
From the moment I contacted them, the entire team prioritized keeping me informed. They explained every step of the process in plain language, ensuring I understood my rights and options as an Oregon resident dealing with a Texas accident. Whether it was gathering evidence like police reports and medical records or handling negotiations with the insurance companies, they were proactive and transparent. I never felt left in the dark, which was a huge relief during such a stressful time.
Their communication was outstanding. They responded promptly to my calls and emails, often checking in even when there were no major updates, just to keep me reassured. This level of care made me feel like more than just a case number—they genuinely understood the challenges of dealing with an accident far from home. The team’s expertise in handling cross-state cases was impressive. They coordinated seamlessly to secure a fair settlement that covered my medical expenses, vehicle repairs, and other damages, all while I focused on recovery. Their compassion and professionalism made a difficult situation feel manageable, and I couldn’t be more grateful for their support.
I highly recommend Herz Law Firm to anyone needing a car accident attorney, especially if you’re dealing with the complexities of an out-of-state incident. Their dedication to clarity, communication, and client care is unmatched. Thank you for helping me get back on my feet!
reviews.ownerResponse: Damarcus, thank you for your detailed review. We always want people to feel at home even when they're halfway across the country! Hope you never have to worry about anything like this again.
